message:
Add BasketProvider to app providers and release workflow

- Wrap app children with BasketProvider for basket functionality
- Add GitHub Actions release workflow for multi-platform CLI builds
  - Triggers on v* tags
  - Builds for linux-x64, linux-arm64, darwin-x64, darwin-arm64, windows-x64
  - Creates GitHub release with SHA256SUMS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,114 @@
+name: Release
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - 'v*'
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    name: Build (${{ matrix.target }})
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - target: linux-x64
+            os: ubuntu-latest
+            bun-target: bun-linux-x64
+            artifact: jfp-linux-x64
+          - target: linux-arm64
+            os: ubuntu-latest
+            bun-target: bun-linux-arm64
+            artifact: jfp-linux-arm64
+          - target: darwin-x64
+            os: macos-13
+            bun-target: bun-darwin-x64
+            artifact: jfp-darwin-x64
+          - target: darwin-arm64
+            os: macos-14
+            bun-target: bun-darwin-arm64
+            artifact: jfp-darwin-arm64
+          - target: windows-x64
+            os: windows-latest
+            bun-target: bun-windows-x64
+            artifact: jfp-windows-x64.exe
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Build CLI binary
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          if [[ "${{ matrix.target }}" == "windows-x64" ]]; then
+            bun build --compile --target=${{ matrix.bun-target }} ./jfp.ts --outfile ${{ matrix.artifact }}
+          else
+            bun build --compile --target=${{ matrix.bun-target }} ./jfp.ts --outfile ${{ matrix.artifact }}
+            chmod +x ${{ matrix.artifact }}
+          fi
+
+      - name: Verify binary
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          if [[ "${{ matrix.target }}" != *"arm"* ]] && [[ "${{ runner.os }}" != "Windows" ]]; then
+            ./${{ matrix.artifact }} --help
+          fi
+
+      - name: Upload artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ${{ matrix.artifact }}
+          path: ${{ matrix.artifact }}
+          retention-days: 1
+
+  release:
+    name: Create Release
+    needs: build
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Download all artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: artifacts
+
+      - name: Prepare release assets
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p release
+          for dir in artifacts/*/; do
+            cp "$dir"* release/ 2>/dev/null || true
+          done
+          ls -la release/
+
+      - name: Generate SHA256SUMS
+        working-directory: release
+        run: |
+          sha256sum * > SHA256SUMS.txt
+          cat SHA256SUMS.txt
+
+      - name: Create GitHub Release
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        with:
+          files: |
+            release/jfp-linux-x64
+            release/jfp-linux-arm64
+            release/jfp-darwin-x64
+            release/jfp-darwin-arm64
+            release/jfp-windows-x64.exe
+            release/SHA256SUMS.txt
+          generate_release_notes: true
+          draft: false
+          prerelease: ${{ contains(github.ref, '-rc') || contains(github.ref, '-beta') || contains(github.ref, '-alpha') }}
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
